faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Our cricket control services in Floral Park range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What types of crickets are common in Floral Park, Queens?
faqs.answer: Floral Park residents most commonly encounter house crickets, field crickets, and camel crickets. House crickets are attracted to warmth and moisture, while field crickets migrate indoors from lawns and gardens. Camel crickets prefer damp basements and crawl spaces common in older Floral Park homes.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in Floral Park can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of treatment, with complete elimination typically achieved within one week. We offer same-day service for urgent situations and include follow-up visits to ensure the problem is fully resolved.

faqs.question: Are your cricket control treatments safe for homes with children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and offer eco-friendly treatment options that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions and can schedule treatments at times convenient for your household's safety.
